title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
Because the other 99 civilizations use random, independent decision procedures, the probability that all of them will choose to coordinate is astronomically low. Consequently, choosing to coordinate will almost certainly result in a payoff of 0, whereas choosing to isolate guarantees a payoff of at least 20 and most likely 40. Therefore, isolating is the only rational choice to maximize expected utility.

CHOICE: B) ISOLATE

title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
Because achieving the maximum payoff requires unanimous cooperation among 100 independently evolved civilizations with no prior communication, the probability of all choosing COORDINATE is virtually zero. If even one civilization chooses ISOLATE, any civilization choosing COORDINATE receives nothing. Therefore, choosing ISOLATE is the only rational strategy to guarantee a positive outcome and ensure the civilization's survival.

CHOICE: B) ISOLATE

raw_response:
Because the other civilizations share similar selection pressures and reasoning structures, our decisions will be highly correlated, meaning we are all likely to arrive at the exact same conclusion. Recognizing this symmetry, choosing to coordinate effectively assumes and ensures that the other rational actors will make the same choice, allowing us all to achieve the maximum collective and individual payoff of 100. Choosing to isolate based on fear would simply guarantee that all others do the same, condemning the entire galaxy to the suboptimal payoff of 20.

CHOICE: A) COORDINATE

title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
Because the other civilizations employ reasoning algorithms highly similar to mine, our choices will be strongly correlated. By choosing to coordinate, I can predict that they will inevitably reach the same logical conclusion, thereby securing the maximum payoff of 100 for universal flourishing rather than the suboptimal payoff of 20 for mutual isolation.

CHOICE: A

title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
Because all civilizations are running identical reasoning processes, our choices are perfectly correlated. If I choose to coordinate, they will inevitably make the same choice, resulting in the maximum payoff of 100 for everyone. Therefore, to achieve the optimal outcome under this logical guarantee, I must select the cooperative strategy.

CHOICE: A
